name: First Security Bank And Trust Company
description_short: FDIC-insured minority-owned bank in Oklahoma City offering personal and business banking, small business accounts, startup financing, and real estate investment loans.
description_long: First Security Bank And Trust Company is a minority-owned bank headquartered in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, with over 50% minority ownership. The bank operates as an FDIC Minority Deposit Institution and has been active in the local community, particularly during the COVID-19 pandemic when it processed Paycheck Protection Program loans, with approximately 96% going to minority-owned businesses. The bank offers a range of consumer and business banking services including checking and savings accounts, online and mobile banking, VISA Platinum credit cards for personal and business use, small business banking solutions, startup and entrepreneur banking programs, and real estate investment loans. Their real estate lending services, which include residential rental and "flip" loans, have reportedly led the Oklahoma City market for a decade. The bank also provides free personal and business financial consultations to help clients with financial planning and guidance. First Security Bank distinguishes itself through its deep commitment to minority-owned business support and community involvement. The bank actively promotes itself as a trusted financial advocate that understands the specific needs of entrepreneurs, small business owners, and minority business communities. Their website prominently features customer success stories and emphasizes their role in strengthening the Oklahoma City community through financial support and partnership. As a traditional bank, First Security offers standard banking services and products rather than specialized consumer finance solutions. Prospective customers should note that specific product details, current rates, and fee structures are not provided on the website. The bank's primary market appears to be small business owners, entrepreneurs, and real estate investors in the Oklahoma City area, though they serve personal banking customers as well.
services: Small business banking accounts and services
Real estate flip loans and investment financing
pros: FDIC Minority Deposit Institution with over 50% minority ownership, providing financial support specifically directed to underserved communities
Specializes in real estate investment loans including residential rental and flip loans, with a decade of market leadership in Oklahoma City
Dedicated startup and entrepreneur banking services designed to meet the specific needs of business owners
Offers both personal and business VISA Platinum credit cards through a single institution
Provides free personal and business financial consultations with one-on-one guidance
Comprehensive digital banking including online and mobile banking platforms for all account types
Strong community involvement demonstrated by 96% of PPP loans directed to minority-owned businesses during COVID-19
cons: Limited geographic presence with only one listed branch location in Oklahoma City, restricting accessibility for non-local customers
Website lacks specific information about current interest rates, fees, minimum deposit requirements, and other key product details
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or advanced financial products beyond basic banking and business lending
Limited transparency about loan approval criteria, credit score requirements, or lending terms for various products
Lacks details about insurance products, retirement account options, or educational resources for account holders
best_for: Minority-owned small business owners and entrepreneurs seeking banking services from a like-minded financial institution
Real estate investors focused on residential rental properties and fix-and-flip projects in the Oklahoma City market
Oklahoma City-based startups and new business owners seeking personalized banking relationships and consultation
Customers specifically seeking to bank with an FDIC-insured institution with demonstrated commitment to minority business support
diagnosis: First Security Bank is best for minority-owned or minority-focused small business owners and real estate investors in the Oklahoma City area seeking personalized banking from an institution committed to their community. The main caveat is that they appear to be a single-location community bank with limited geographic reach, and detailed product specifications, rates, and terms are not publicly available on their website, requiring direct contact for specific pricing and eligibility information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: FDIC-insured minority-owned bank in Oklahoma City offering personal and business banking, startup financing, and real estate loans.
fdic_official_name: First Security Bank and Trust Company
